properties.name: Sever do Vouga / Albergaria-a-Velha / Oliveira de Azeméis
properties.description: Frozen pilot AOI — Aveiro district, anchored on the September 2024 fire complex (>47,000 ha in north-centre, fatalities, residential damage in Sever do Vouga and Albergaria-a-Velha, state of calamity declared). Geometry identical to alt_aveiro_sever_do_vouga.geojson; that file is retained as the alternative-set archive. Selection rationale documented in docs/aoi_rationale.md (decision dated 2026-05-07).
properties.rationale: Recent (2024) severe burn, wildland-urban interface damage, dense e-Redes / REN power infrastructure exposure, eucalyptus-heavy fuel mix typical of the Centro–Norte transition — best alignment with the Overstory product surface (strike trees, span-level hazard).
properties.source: PRE_DEV_CHECKLIST.md item D — pilot freeze on 2026-05-07.
